zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kirby於1521年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾斯坦登時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Kirby22歲，母親Joan23歲。他於1548年7月22日與Joan Smythe在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1573年11月14日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kirby于1521年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾斯坦登时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Kirby22岁，母亲Joan23岁。他于1548年7月22日与Joan Smythe在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1573年11月14日在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kirby was born in 1521, in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas Kirby, was 22 and his mother, Joan, was 23. He married Joan Smythe on 22 July 1548, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 14 November 1573, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kirby est né en 1521, à Standon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas Kirby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Smythe le 22 juillet 1548, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1573, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kirby 1521 in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Kirby 22 und seine Mutter Joan 23. Er hat am 22. Juli 1548 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England Joan Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 14. November 1573 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kirby è nato il nel 1521 nel Standon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Kirby, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Smythe il 22 luglio 1548, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 novembre 1573, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kirbyが1521年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスタンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Kirbyは22歳，母Joanは23歳であった。1548年7月22日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドでJoan Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1573年11月14日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kirby(이)가 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Kirby(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1548년 7월 22일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 Joan Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1573년 11월 14일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kirby nasceu em 1521, em Standon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Kirby, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Smythe em 22 de julho de 1548, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1573, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kirby родился в 1521 г. в местности стандон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Kirby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Smythe 22 июля 1548 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 14 ноября 1573 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Kirby nació en 1521, en Standon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas Kirby, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Smythe el 22 de julio de 1548, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1573, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
